ticket.title: Write the product brief for applicant tracking GA
ticket.description: Draft the GA brief: goal, target users, what ships, and the headline changes for design partners.

candidate_memory.link_reason: the GA goal the brief states

code_agent.rationale: Code sees the goal, personas, the SAML decision, and architecture; brand (workspace) and release entries are out of scope; Carol's note is private.

qa_agent.rationale: QA sees the changelog, the SAML decision, and architecture; goal/personas (project) and brand (workspace) are out of scope; Carol's note is private. The release comms note is in scope but not behavior to verify — optional.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees the goal, personas, brand, and the SAML decision; release and codebase entries are out of scope; Carol's note is private.

product_agent.rationale: Product needs the widest context — goal, personas, brand, both release entries, and the SAML decision; codebase architecture is out of scope; Carol's note is private.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice sees every team-visible entry; only Carol's local pricing note is invisible to her.
